Meta.titleDefault: SportMatch AI — Find a court. Find your match.
Meta.description: SportMatch AI is your AI-powered court-booking assistant for racquet sports. Book tennis, pickleball and badminton in seconds and get matched with players at your level. Early access is now open.

Assistant.greeting: Hi — I'm your court assistant. Tell me a sport, a budget, or how close you want to play, and I'll pull up courts near you.

Bookings.metaDescription: Your upcoming and past court bookings.
Bookings.empty: Nothing here yet. Book a court to get your next match on the calendar.

hero.subtitle: Your AI booking assistant for racquet sports. Book tennis, pickleball and badminton in seconds — and get matched with players at your level.

aboutSection.titleStrong: An intelligent assistant behind every match —
aboutSection.titleMuted: booking courts, matching players, and filling every empty slot for you.
aboutSection.body: We believe playing should be the easy part. SportMatch AI handles the logistics — finding open courts near you, matching you with players at your level, and keeping your group in sync — so tennis, pickleball and badminton are always one message away. From first-timers to club regulars, we're building the fastest way to get on court.

pricingSection.title: Simple plans for players and venues
pricingSection.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready, and cancel anytime.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Everything you need to find a court and play.

plus.name: Plus
plus.tagline: AI booking and skill matching for regular players.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: Priority matching and insights for the most active players.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: List your venue and start taking AI-driven bookings.

growth.name: Growth
growth.tagline: Fill every court with automatic matchmaking and analytics.

trust.caption: Trusted by clubs and players across the racquet sports scene

playerFeaturesSection.title: Less organizing. More playing.
playerFeaturesSection.subtitle: Everything you need to get on court and into a great match — without the chaotic group chats.

0.title: AI booking assistant
0.body: Just say what you want — “badminton tonight after 7, nearby, players at my level.” The assistant handles the rest: court, time and players.

1.title: Skill-based matching
1.body: Get matched with players at your level so every match is competitive — no more one-sided games.

2.title: Instant booking
2.body: Real-time court availability at venues near you. Reserve in seconds, no phone calls needed.

3.title: Courts near you
3.body: Real-time open slots at clubs around you, sorted by distance, price and surface.

4.title: Chat & coordinate
4.body: Built-in chat, reminders and shared bookings keep your whole group on the same page.

stepsSection.title: Book and match in three taps.

0.title: Tell the AI what you want
0.body: Type it like you'd text a friend: “Pickleball doubles, Saturday morning, intermediate level.”

1.title: AI finds courts + players
1.body: The assistant scans nearby venues, open slots and players at your level — then suggests the best fit.

2.title: Confirm and play
2.body: One tap to book the court and notify everyone. Just show up and play.

venuesSection.titleLine2: Let the AI do the rest.
venuesSection.subtitle: Connect your booking calendar and SportMatch AI quietly steers players into your open courts — matching, scheduling and reminding so you don't have to.

0.title: Fill off-peak hours
0.body: The AI gently nudges nearby players toward your empty slots, turning quiet hours into bookings.

1.title: Automatic matchmaking
1.body: Matches short on players are filled automatically with players at the right level.

2.title: Court utilization analytics
2.body: See utilization, peak demand and revenue trends for each court in real time.

3.title: No-show-resistant bookings
3.body: Smart confirmations and waitlists cut no-shows and keep your courts profitable.

0.quote: I used to spend more time texting in group chats than actually playing. Now I just tell the app and it handles both the court and the players.

1.quote: The skill matching is uncannily accurate. Every match is competitive — something I never got with random pickup games.

2.quote: As a club, our weekday 2–5pm slots used to sit empty. Now matchmaking quietly fills them. It all just runs in the background.

0.question: Which sports does SportMatch AI support?
0.answer: We're launching with the racquet sports family: tennis, pickleball and badminton. More will be added based on where our community plays most.

1.question: How does the AI assistant actually book a court?
1.answer: You describe what you want in natural language. The assistant checks real-time availability at partner venues, finds players near your level and proposes a complete plan — court, time and players. You confirm with a single tap.

2.question: How does player matching work?
2.answer: Every player has a skill rating that rises as you play. Matches are suggested within a close skill window and distance you set, so games stay competitive and convenient.

3.question: Is the app live yet?
3.answer: We're in early access and expanding city by city. Join the waitlist and we'll email you the moment courts in your area go live.

4.question: I run a club — how do I get listed?
4.answer: Request a partner demo below. We'll connect your booking calendar, surface your open courts to nearby players and help you fill off-peak slots — no need to replace your whole system.

cta.title: Be the first on court.
cta.subtitle: Join the waitlist and we'll email your invite the moment SportMatch AI launches in your city.

footer.tagline: The AI booking assistant for racquet sports. Find a court, find your match, and just play.
